pageSubtitle: Configure teaching periods, breaks, and advanced scheduling options
title: Period Structure
description: Configure period counts, duration, and breaks

sections.basicConfigDesc: Default period count and duration per period
sections.defaultPeriodsDesc: Default number of teaching periods per day
sections.periodDurationDesc: Duration of each teaching period in minutes
sections.dynamicPeriodsDesc: Different period counts for different days of the week
sections.categoryPeriodsDesc: Different period counts for different grade categories
sections.breaksDesc: Configure break times between teaching periods
sections.prayerBreaksDesc: Configure prayer intervals shown in timetable times and exports

help.overview: On this page you can configure the teaching period structure, duration of each period, breaks, and advanced settings.
help.defaultPeriods: Period count must be between {{min}} and {{max}}
help.periodDuration: Duration must be between {{min}} and {{max}} minutes
help.dynamicPeriods: Enter the desired period count for each active school day
help.categoryPeriods: Specify the period count for each category-day combination
help.breakPeriods: Breaks are placed between teaching periods. Example: 15-minute break after the 3rd period
help.prayerBreaks: Add the prayer intervals that should appear in timetable times and exports
help.prayerBreaksPresentationOnly: Prayer intervals adjust displayed clock times and exports. They do not reserve solver periods or change lesson placement.
help.breaksShorterCategories: Breaks are configured per day for the whole school. Shorter categories stop earlier and ignore later break slots.
help.inheritedBreaks: This day currently inherits the shared default break layout. Customize it only if this day needs a different pattern.
help.noBreakSlots: This target only has one teaching period, so there are no break slots.
help.zeroDisablesBreak: Set to 0 to leave no break at this point.
help.noAdvancedBreaks: No sparse break rows yet. Use the slot editor above or add one here.

tooltips.dynamicPeriods: Enable this option to set different period counts for each day of the week. For example, Friday can have fewer periods.
tooltips.categoryPeriods: Enable this option to set different period counts for each grade category (Primary, Middle, High).
tooltips.periodDuration: Standard duration of each teaching period in minutes
tooltips.breaks: Breaks are placed between teaching periods

helpText.dynamicPeriods: Enter the desired period count for each active school day
helpText.categoryPeriods: Specify the period count for each category-day combination
helpText.prayerBreaks: Add the prayer intervals that should appear in timetable times and exports

validation.periodCountMin: Period count must be at least 1
validation.durationMin: Duration must be at least 15 minutes
validation.breakAfterPeriodMin: Period number must be at least 1
validation.breakDurationMin: Break duration must be at least 5 minutes
validation.breakDurationMax: Break duration must not exceed 60 minutes
validation.duplicateBreak: Only one break can follow a teaching period
validation.prayerBreakBeforeMidnight: A prayer break must end before midnight
validation.periodCountTooLow: The period count is below the allowed minimum
validation.durationTooLow: The period duration is below the allowed minimum
validation.noActiveDays: No active school days are configured
validation.duplicateSharedBreak: The shared break schedule contains a duplicate period
validation.sharedBreakOutOfRange: A shared break is outside the configured period range
validation.inactiveDayBreak: A break override exists for an inactive day
validation.duplicateDayBreak: A day-specific break schedule contains a duplicate period
validation.dayBreakOutOfRange: A day-specific break is outside the configured period range

errors.revisionConflictDescription: Reload the page to review the latest period settings before saving again.

unsavedChanges.confirmMessage: You have unsaved changes. What would you like to do?
